headline: VICI Properties Inc (NYSE:VICI) Q1 2026 AFFO Beats Estimates as Growth Pipeline Expands
summary: VICI Properties Q1 2026 AFFO beat estimates despite a slight revenue miss. With raised guidance and a $1.16B casino acquisition, the experiential REIT focuses on its strong growth pipeline.

headline: This Sleepy Casino REIT Is an Income Lover's Dream
summary: Of the two major casino REITs, Gaming and Leisure Properties gets less attention, but its income story is potentially potent.
